name: Service details page
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete service-details page for a UAE government service called 'Payment of a traffic fine' as a single standalone HTML page. The service requires the user to log in with UAE Pass before starting. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; breadcrumb navigation; the service title with a prominent 'Start service' action; an 'About this service' section; 'The process' as numbered steps; 'Conditions of use'; a frequently-asked-questions section; the service specifications (completion duration, service fees, service channels, payment channels, target audience, support); related services; and everything else a standard UAE government service page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template
access control: service requires UAE Pass login (ServiceDetails v1-v3)
primary CTA present in all three TDRA variants
